name: espresso
description: Eliminates hedging, filler, re-contextualization, and meta-commentary from every Claude response. Keeps code, errors, types, and APIs untouched. Ships with 3 noise levels and full artifact exemption.
long_description: espresso rewires how Claude communicates in Claude Code. Instead of 3 paragraphs of hedging for a simple bug fix, you get the fix. Instead of 'Great question! Let me analyze that for you...', you get the answer. Every technical element — code blocks, TypeScript types, React hooks, Tailwind classes, CLI commands, stack traces — is reproduced with full fidelity. Artifacts are fully exempt: components, dashboards, and visualizations get full design treatment. Three levels let you dial noise reduction from surgical (lite) to extreme (ultra).
